comments.body: @rhatdan @baude i'll try and have some debian packagers review this

I'd like to let this PR rest a bit, atleast until I've figured out a painless way to consistently build packages and send to PPA.

ATM the PPA process expects tarballs to be of the $NAME_$VERSION.orig.tar.gz format and will reject uploads if a tarball has the same name but with different contents. Which means I've yet to figure out how to build random intermediate commits where the version number doesn't change.
closing, will open a new one asap, thanks for the comments guys
